sourceCoverage.finding: YunYouJun/cook recipe.csv rows are present in the generated library.

vegetarian_profile_conflicts_with_meat_o.description: profile contains vegetarian while contains includes meat or seafood.

vegan_friendly_conflicts_with_animal_con.description: diet contains vegan_friendly while contains includes animal ingredients.

halal_friendly_conflicts_with_pork_or_al.description: diet contains halal_friendly while contains includes pork or alcohol.

vegetarian_profile_with_unmodeled_animal.description: profile vegetarian was inferred even though raw text includes animal terms not modeled in canonical meat detection.

recipe_notes_contain_halal_explanation.description: Generated halal disclaimer was written into recipe notes instead of staying in UI/help copy.

recipe_notes_contain_cuisine_labels.description: Cuisine labels appear in free-form notes; they are not structured or source-confidence tracked.

western_marker_with_chinese_cuisine_note.description: Recipe title/materials look western or non-Chinese while notes contain a Chinese cuisine label.

onion_alias_also_indexes_scallion.description: Ingredient alias matching adds 葱 when only 洋葱 appears.

specific_pork_cut_collapsed_to_generic_p.description: Specific pork cuts are collapsed into generic 猪肉, which explains broad matches like 排骨 -> 猪肉.

garbled_text_markers.description: Materials, steps, or notes contain extraction artifacts such as ?? or replacement glyphs.
